methodsAttempted.query: site:yorku.ca York University generative AI policy ChatGPT academic integrity students instructors
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search surfaced official York academic-integrity pages, a LA&PS student guidance page, and the Teaching & Learning GenAI student page.

methodsAttempted.query: site:yorku.ca York University generative AI privacy confidential data security AI tools
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search surfaced official UIT pages and VPFA-approved PDF guidelines for administrative GenAI use, AI chatbots, and AI meeting assistants.
The York University robots.txt for www.yorku.ca contained an empty Disallow directive for User-agent: * and listed official York sitemaps.

methodsAttempted.query: www.yorku.ca unit vpacad academic-integrity AI technology teachingandlearning gen-ai UIT AI
methodsAttempted.notes: Direct official fetches verified the VPACAD Academic Integrity pages, the Teaching & Learning GenAI faculty page, and UIT AI resources.

artifacts.summary: Official York discovery found VPFA-approved administrative GenAI guidelines, administrative chatbot and meeting-assistant guidelines, York UIT sanctioned-tool guidance, and VPACAD academic-integrity guidance. Claims are scoped to administrative or course-context language from those sources.

artifacts.notes: Claim is limited to administrative or operational activities and uses the source's management-approval language.
Direct UIT source uses mandatory language for York University data and public AI platforms.
Claim combines adjacent statements from the same official UIT source and stays scoped to UIT-listed sanctioned or approved tools.
Claim is scoped to administrative AI meeting assistants and uses mandatory consent language from the official PDF.
Claim mirrors the central Academic Integrity page and does not infer a blanket ban or permission rule.
Claim uses the source's recommendation language and avoids converting teaching guidance into a binding policy.

artifacts.title: York University AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: York University has official public guidance covering administrative and operational GenAI use, public AI platform data restrictions, sanctioned AI tools, AI meeting assistants, and academic-integrity/teaching expectations. The strongest sources are York UIT/CIO VPFA-approved PDF guidelines, the York UIT AI page, and central VPACAD Academic Integrity guidance. A faculty-specific LA&PS page and a stale Teaching & Learning instructor path were not used for direct claims.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Administrative GenAI claims are scoped to University administrative or operational activities as stated in the source PDFs.
Teaching guidance claims are not presented as binding university-wide policy unless the source itself uses mandatory language.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
